text_block_list.text:
On my way home from shopping with Biwa
Hayahide, we hear lively singing coming from
somewhere.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Judging by the poster over there, it looks like a
concert's being held nearby.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Woohoo! Flying in from out of nowhere, it's
Tokaaai Teiooo!

text_block_list.name: Idols
text_block_list.text:
Wooo! Everyone's so hyped up!
We're not losing to you, though! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
T-Teio? What is she doing up there, dancing with
those idols?!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Did you see how she moved? She was so elegant
and expressive... She fits right in with the other
professionals on stage.
choice_data_list: She was definitely pretty into it.
She was definitely pretty into it.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I feel so ashamed of myself.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Compared to her, I'm stiff as a board when I
dance. There's no way my clumsy moves are
conveying my gratitude to the fans...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
There must be some trick to being able to dance
so well.
choice_data_list: Why don't you try dancing with her?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Of course! That's a great idea!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Your performance was superb, Teio. I enjoyed it
immensely.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Oh, thank you! Hehe! Seeing them dance made
me all giddy, so I decided to jump on up there!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
You truly did! I was wondering if—no, wait. I need
to approach this more respectfully...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Miss Teio, would you please teach me the secret
to dancing confidently?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: "Miss Teio"?! Aw, gosh, you don't have to be that respectful! But I guess I am a pretty good dancer...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Please, I implore you! You must teach me how to
dance without looking like I'm made out of wood!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're not... really made out of wood, are you?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
I don't really get it, but whatever! For starters,
why don't you show me some moves?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Uh... Right here?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! I'm your teacher now, so you gotta listen to
me! Come on, copy my steps!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: A-am I doing this correctly?

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Well, look at you! You definitely seem like the
real deal to me! Your height makes your moves
super dynamic too!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You've got a lot going for you, so don't worry! As
your teacher, I think you'll be fine as long as you
polish up those skills of yours!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
I understand now... So I have my very own way of
expressing myself!

Thanks to Tokai Teio's encouragement and help,
Biwa Hayahide's dance moves improve greatly!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: ...Huh?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Ooh, you want to go up and dance too?
Nice! Go ahead! You can do it!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: W-wait, I never said I wanted to—

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Hey, Hayahide! Let me guess. You can't resist the
beat either, huh?

text_block_list.name: Idols
text_block_list.text:
Yay! Come on, show us your moves!
Get over here and let's gooo!

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Gah! How did this happen?

text_block_list.name: Idols
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! My heart is filled with so much love, love,
looove!
All for you, you, youuu! Woo! ♪

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: W-woo...

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Awww, you're sooo cute! C'mon, you've gotta
dance with everyone!
Encore! Encore!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Ahh, that was fun! Nothing relaxes me like a good
dance sesh!
choice_data_list: You were both fantastic up there.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Pant... Pant... You really... think so? I actually got... pretty absorbed in it, myself...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You were perfect! All the fans loved you! Dancing is all about feeling!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
Think about it—the reason why we dance at our
winning concerts is because we want to make our
fans happy, right?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Ah! Yes, now that you mention it...

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Hm... I guess the secret to dancing confidently
was inside me the whole time.

Biwa Hayahide's worries melt away, and her dance
moves improve greatly.
